tx.en: Don't let a dry mouth steal your focus

story.en: Before a test, your mouth gets dry and rough. It makes you nervous. If you have no water, find a small thread from your shirt. Chew it many times. It makes saliva come back. Now your mind is back on the test.

tx.en: Breathe and feel the saliva return

q.en: What can you do if your mouth is dry and you have no water?

op: Chew a small thread from your clothes
ex: Chewing a thread creates saliva and focus

tx.en: Your mind is back. Focus on the test.

story.en: When waiting for your parents' car, stay where they can see you. Don't get too close to the moving auto. Stay far from danger until they call you. Safety first, then the ride.

q.en: Where should you wait for the car?

op: In the middle of the road
Where your parents can see you

tx.en: Look around. Stay in the safe zone.

story.en: When you arrive, wait. The car must be stopped completely. Then unbuckle your belt. Exit only on the safe side where no cars are passing. Be like a pro.

q.en: When is it safe to unbuckle and get out?

op: When the car is moving slow
When the car is fully stopped
As soon as you see the house

tx.en: Wait for the car to stand still

story.en: When you enter a place, look around for 10 seconds to 1 minute. Find the exit. Find the entrance. Look for the police or a worker who knows things. Even if you know the place, look again.

q.en: What should you look for first in a new place?

ex: Exits and authority keep you safe

tx.en: Be the master of your hallways

story.en: Memorize every door in school. Know who to follow in an emergency. If there is a threat, remember: Hide, Stay Safe, and Run if you can. You are prepared, so you are not afraid.

q.en: If there is a big danger at school, what do you do?

tx.en: MISSION 55: THE NUMBERS IN YOUR HEAD
Your mind is your best phone

story.en: Your brain must keep the phone numbers of your parents and family. If there is an accident or you get lost, you don't need a phone, you have the numbers in your memory. You are never truly lost.

tx.en: Repeat the numbers in your mind

inf.en: Locks info in your long-term memory

q.en: Why should you memorize phone numbers?

op: To be safe if you lose your phone
ex: Memory is your backup in emergencies

tx.en: Control your mind while you sleep

story.en: To have superpowers, keep your brain active for 30 minutes before bed. When you sleep, you are in your dreams. Since it is YOUR dream, you can control it. You are the boss of your mind.

inf.en: Prepares your brain for lucid dreaming

q.en: Who controls what happens in your dreams?

ex: It is your mind, you have the power

inf.en: Builds the connection between mind and dream
